ax-deterministic-required-fields-post.description: POST operations must explicitly declare required fields via x-ax-required-fields for deterministic agent consumption.

ax-deterministic-required-fields-put.description: PUT operations must explicitly declare required fields via x-ax-required-fields for deterministic agent consumption.

ax-deterministic-required-fields-patch.description: PATCH operations must explicitly declare required fields via x-ax-required-fields for deterministic agent consumption.

ax-deterministic-schema-type.description: All schema properties must have explicit types. Agents cannot infer types from context.
ax-deterministic-schema-type.message: Schema property at {{path}} must have an explicit 'type' field

ax-deterministic-no-additional-propertie.description: Schemas should not allow arbitrary additional properties. Use additionalProperties: false for strict typing.
ax-deterministic-no-additional-propertie.message: Schema at {{path}} should set additionalProperties: false for deterministic responses

ax-introspectable-capabilities-post.description: POST operations should declare x-ax-capabilities for agent discovery of API intent.
ax-introspectable-capabilities-post.message: {{description}} - add x-ax-capabilities to {{path}} for agent discoverability

ax-introspectable-capabilities-get.description: GET operations should declare x-ax-capabilities for agent discovery of API intent.
ax-introspectable-capabilities-get.message: {{description}} - add x-ax-capabilities to {{path}} for agent discoverability

ax-introspectable-operation-id-post.description: All POST operations must have an operationId for programmatic reference.

ax-introspectable-operation-id-patch.description: All PATCH operations must have an operationId for programmatic reference.
ax-introspectable-operation-id-patch.message: Operation at {{path}} must have operationId for agent introspection

ax-introspectable-operation-id-delete.description: All DELETE operations must have an operationId for programmatic reference.
ax-introspectable-operation-id-delete.message: Operation at {{path}} must have operationId for agent introspection

ax-introspectable-summary-post.description: All POST operations must have a summary for agent understanding.

ax-recoverable-retryable-post.description: POST operations should indicate retry semantics via x-ax-retryable for safe agent retry logic.

ax-recoverable-retryable-put.description: PUT operations should indicate retry semantics via x-ax-retryable for safe agent retry logic.

ax-recoverable-retryable-patch.description: PATCH operations should indicate retry semantics via x-ax-retryable for safe agent retry logic.

ax-recoverable-retryable-delete.description: DELETE operations should indicate retry semantics via x-ax-retryable for safe agent retry logic.

ax-recoverable-idempotent-put.description: PUT operations should indicate idempotency via x-ax-idempotent.
ax-recoverable-idempotent-put.message: {{description}} - add x-ax-idempotent to {{path}} for safe agent retry

ax-recoverable-idempotent-delete.description: DELETE operations should indicate idempotency via x-ax-idempotent.
ax-recoverable-idempotent-delete.message: {{description}} - add x-ax-idempotent to {{path}} for safe agent retry

ax-explicit-request-body-required-post.description: POST request bodies must explicitly set required: true or false.
ax-explicit-request-body-required-post.message: Request body at {{path}} must explicitly set 'required' field

ax-explicit-parameter-required.description: All parameters must explicitly set required: true or false.

ax-testable-sandboxable-post.description: POST operations should indicate sandbox safety via x-ax-sandboxable for agent testing.

ax-auth-service-account.description: API should support non-interactive authentication (API key, bearer token, service account).
